sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 2

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 2:1
items.html:
(to the question) Avira Dachya [pure air]
It is the discernment of the Rucha Kadma'a [first spirit]. See Answer 98. (p. 747, Item 20)
